visual_description: A shirtless boxer lies motionless on a metal table wearing black gloves and green shorts, his head tilted back under a bright hanging lamp. An older man in a dark suit stands to the left holding a hat, while a woman with short hair leans over the boxer's head, appearing to examine him. In the background, two men stand near a doorway, one wearing a light shirt and the other in darker clothing, observing the scene.
audio_description: The audio is muffled and quiet, with only faint background noises and no clear speech.
